phases.label: phase 1
phases.title: just me and Claude
phases.description: no memory, no structure. every session started from zero. good sessions happened but nothing carried over.
phases.insight: raw capability without memory is powerful but wasteful

phases.label: phase 2
phases.title: added the knowledge base
phases.description: started capturing sessions in an Obsidian vault. just writing things down — no rules, no search, no automation.
phases.insight: the habit of capture was the foundation for everything else

phases.label: phase 3
phases.title: built the bridge
phases.description: KB server connected the vault to Claude sessions. search, brief, capture, measure — all through tools. knowledge started flowing both directions.
phases.insight: the knowledge base is useless if the worker can't reach it

phases.label: phase 4
phases.title: system self-improvement
phases.description: the system proposes changes to itself, runs experiments, measures impact, keeps or reverts. scheduled tasks handle daily triage, weekly health, monthly deep cleans.
phases.insight: a system that can improve itself compounds faster than one that waits for human intervention
